title: What’s some advice you’d pass along to someone looking to follow behind your steps?
caption:
What’s some advice you’d pass along to someone looking to follow behind your steps? 

4 years later and this was definitely one of my favorite interviews 😎 Advice about what they wish they knew if they had to start all over from the Black Porsche Club of Atlanta. Missing Paco and Stephan for sure❤️🕊️ but am super thankful to have crossed paths on the journey! 

#blackhistory #atlanta #blackhistorymonth

title: My favorite part was hearing how much fun she had playing together after 😇 I definitely hope as I continue to age, I can
caption:
My favorite part was hearing how much fun she had playing together after 😇 I definitely hope as I continue to age, I can still move and when I meet a young person and ask them to play they don’t give me crap about not being able to move fast 😂😂😂 They were targeting shots that were hard to get(play to win I get it 😅) and she was apologizing but I told her no need I’ll do all the running for the both of us let’s just have fun and we won both games 😎 

#pickleball #fun in #atlanta
